title: Set Union and Intersection
mermaid: graph TD A1[Start] --> B1["Initialize Result Set: Empty Set"] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 --> C1[Iterate through elements in Set A] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C1 --> D1{{"Element 'x' in Set A?"}} style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 D1 -- Yes --> E1[Element 'x' also in Set B?] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 -- Yes --> F1["Add 'x' to Intersection Set"] style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 -- No --> G1["Next element in A"] style G1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1 -- No --> H1["Add 'x' to Union Set"] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff F1 --> G1 H1 --> G1 G1 --> I1{{"More elements in Set A?"}} style I1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 I1 -- Yes --> C1 I1 -- No --> J1[Initialize Result Set (for Union): A] style J1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 J1 --> K1[Iterate through elements in Set B] style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff K1 --> L1{{"Element 'y' in Set B?"}} style L1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 L1 -- Yes --> M1[Element 'y' already in Set A (Union)?] style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff M1 -- Yes --> N1["Next element in B"] style N1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff M1 -- No --> O1["Add 'y' to Union Set"] style O1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 -- No --> N1 O1 --> N1 N1 --> P1{{"More elements in Set B?"}} style P1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 P1 -- Yes --> K1 P1 -- No --> Q1[Union Set (A ∪ B)] style Q1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff I1 -- No --> Q1 Q1 --> R1[Intersection Set (A ∩ B)] style R1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff R1 --> S1[End] style S1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
